steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage immediately characterizes the Cambrian explosion as a “sudden appearance and rapid diversification” of animal remains.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Abrupt” directly expresses the target meaning: sudden occurrence without warning, which matches the “sudden appearance” described in the first sentence. The other three don't capture this core sense—”catastrophic” emphasizes disaster, “elusive” means hard to detect, and “imminent” describes something about to happen. That matches choice C — C is correct.
